description_long: This is a compact, rectangular cabinet or shelf unit with a minimalist design, finished in a uniform light gray color. The front features a single, wide drawer with a circular cutout handle, positioned below an open shelf compartment. The sides are solid and flat, with no visible ornamentation or hardware, contributing to its modern aesthetic. The back and side views reveal a plain, unembellished surface, likely constructed from engineered wood or laminate. The top surface is flat and can serve as an additional support area for objects. This piece is suitable for use as a nightstand, side table, or small storage unit in urban environments such as apartments, offices, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern, light gray cabinet with a single drawer and open shelf, featuring a circular cutout handle and flat surfaces. Its minimalist design makes it suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelf above a single drawer with a circular cutout handle.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, solid panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front but without the open shelf or handle, showing a flat, unadorned surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the first side, with a plain, featureless panel.
